title: TFC Artisanal
description: Artisanal is an addon for TerraFirmaCraft that adds various branches to the technology tree, as well as generally enhancing its realism.
body:
This is a re-upload of [MrHiTech](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mrhitech/projects)'s mod, [TFC Artisanal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-artisanal), in compliance with the mod's [license](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-artisanal#license), and with explicit permission from the author. No updates beyond what the original author releases will be published here. The mod is offered as it is on its original platform.

**_Due to how busy I can be lately I tend to miss releases of the mod. If you find the mod is needing of an update here on Modrinth, please ping me in the [TerraFirmaCraft Discord](https://discord.com/invite/PRuAKvY) (@mskarmagick) and I will accomodate as early as possible._**


**_You can check [the original mod page's uploads tab](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-artisanal/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&showAlphaFiles=show) for up to date versions when this falls behind._**
~~----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------~~

### About

Artisanal is an addon for TerraFirmaCraft that adds various branches to the technology tree, as well as generally enhancing its realism.

### Features
![Player using the magnifying glass item to attempt to start a fire.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MrHiTech123/Artisanal/refs/heads/main/readme/magnifying_glass.png)
_A magnifying glass being used to start a fire_

**Tech Tree branches**
- Soapmaking
- Quillmaking
- Food Preservation
- - Potting meat
- - Canning

- Sugar Production
- Powdered Milk

**Other features**
- Magnifying glass
- A juicing system
- Expanded crafting options for Flint and Steel

**Recipe Enhancements**
- Bloomeries can be crafted with all metal sheets of Tier II or higher, not just Bronze
- Salt water can be boiled in a pot to make salt
- Jars return their lids when opened

Artisanal is fully integrated with the Firmalife and Lithic Addons.
